message:
feat(fcp-sandbox): add deterministic WASI clocks, network socket gating, and env isolation

Extend the WASI sandbox with deterministic time sources and network
access controls for reproducible connector execution:

- FixedWallClock: returns a constant timestamp for deterministic builds
- FixedMonotonicClock: returns monotonically increasing values with a
  configurable step size (AtomicU64-based, thread-safe)
- deterministic_seed_bytes(): generate deterministic random seed from
  the RNG for WASI random_get
- Network socket gating via SocketAddrUse integration to enforce
  egress policy at the WASI socket level
- Deterministic clocks trait implementations (HostWallClock,
  HostMonotonicClock) for wasmtime-wasi

Also fix integration test to match updated API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
